summary: Tested Growth Economy System APIs. All 6 endpoints working correctly. Mining formula R(U) = max(3, 8 - 0.5 × log₂(U)) and Network cap formula min(4000, 800 + 16×D) verified. Redeem calculation example (1000 PRC at rate 11 = 1360 PRC deducted, ₹90.91 received) matches requirements exactly.
critical_code_review_comments: Mining formula correctly implements R(U) = max(3, 8 - 0.5 × log₂(U)) with min=3, max=8 PRC per user
Network cap formula correctly implements min(4000, 800 + 16×D) with base=800, increment=16, max=4000
Redeem calculation correctly applies: Burn 5% + Processing ₹10 (converted to PRC) + Admin 20%
All admin endpoints properly validate input ranges (redeem_percent must be 50/60/70/80/100)
Dynamic PRC rate system with manual override and expiry support working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Economy System fully tested. Current settings: redeem_percent=70%, burn_rate=5%, processing_fee=₹10, admin_charge=20%, base_mining=550, prc_rate=11. All formulas verified.

features_tested.economy_settings_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/growth/economy-settings returns all settings with defaults
features_tested.prc_rate_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/growth/prc-rate returns current rate (11.0 PRC = ₹1)
features_tested.mining_formula: PASS - R(U) = max(3, 8 - 0.5 × log₂(U)) verified for all test cases
features_tested.network_cap_formula: PASS - min(4000, 800 + 16×D) verified for all test cases
features_tested.admin_economy_settings: PASS - Admin can update settings (requires auth)
features_tested.admin_prc_rate_override: PASS - Admin can set/remove PRC rate override
features_tested.input_validation: PASS - Negative/zero values correctly rejected with 400 status

formula_verification.redeem_example: 1000 PRC at rate 11: Burn 50 + Processing 110 + Admin 200 = Total 1360 PRC, User gets ₹90.91 ✓
